title: Unveiling the antiviral inhibitory activity of ebselen and ebsulfur derivatives on SARS-CoV-2 using machine learning-based QSAR, LB-PaCS-MD, and experimental assay

errors.description: The error is that the equation for pIC50 was incorrectly written as just 1/IC50, when it should be pIC50 = log(1/IC50 (M)), which is the standard way to calculate pIC50.
